verses.text: Topa aw, nangmah hong phatin ka diang ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh kei nong laamto khin a, ka tungah ka galte na lungdamsak kei hi
Topa ka Pasian aw, huhna a hong ngenin nang tungah kong awng a, kei na hong damsak khin hi
Topa aw, Leinuai panin kei nong paikhiatpihto khin a, Leihawm sungah a pai khinsate lak panin kei nong nungta kiksak hi
Ama mi siangthote aw, Topa tungah phatna la sa-in ama tungah lungdamna ko un
Ama hehna tomno sung bek hi a, ama hong deihsakna pen khang tawntung-a ding ahi hi. Zan hun sungteng kahna omkha mah ding a, ahih hangin zing khuavak tawh nuamna hong tung hi
Keimah in ahih leh, ka daupai laitakin, “Ka kiling ngei kei ding hi,” ka ci kha hi
Topa aw, nong deihsakna tawh mual kip bangin kei nong phut khin hi. Ahi zongin tu-in na maitang na seel a, kei ka khasia hi
Topa aw, nangma tungah kong kiko a, Topa tungah kong thum hi
“Leihawm sungah paisukin ka sihna-ah bang meetna om ahi hiam? Leivui in nang hong phat ding ahi hiam? Na thumanna gen ding ahi hiam
Topa aw, hong za in la, kei hong hehpih in. Topa aw, keimah huhpa hong hi in,” ka ci hi

Topa ka Pasian aw, nangma tungah lungdamna ka hong koh tawntung theihna ding, ka lungsim in nang hong phat theihna ding, a dai om mawklohna dingin ka thumna leh ka taunate lamna tawh nong heisak a, dahna lim ahi ka puanhampi hong suahkhiat sakin nuamna na hong guan hi.
